2026-0482
2026-05-26NRCANCanadian Energy Regulator ActReappointment of a full-time Commissioner of the Canadian Energy RegulatorReappointment of Stephania Luciuk of Calgary, Alberta, as a full-time Commissioner of the Canadian Energy Regulator, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective August 28, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time Commissioner of the Canadian Energy Regulator
precis: Reappointment of Stephania Luciuk of Calgary, Alberta, as a full-time Commissioner of the Canadian Energy Regulator, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective August 28, 2026.
